steps: Log in to your FusionAuth admin UI at https://<your-fusionauth-host>/admin
Navigate to Settings in the left sidebar
Click the green '+' button to create a new API key
Optionally restrict the key to specific tenants and endpoints
Click 'Save' and copy the generated API key from the list

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Your FusionAuth API key, passed directly in the Authorization header without any prefix

notes: FusionAuth is self-hosted — replace 'your-fusionauth-host' with your actual instance hostname
Community Edition is free and open source; Cloud plans are available at fusionauth.io/pricing
API keys can be scoped to specific tenants and HTTP methods per endpoint for least-privilege access
Keys can also be created via the API Key API (requires an existing superuser key)
The Authorization header takes the raw key value with no prefix (e.g., 'Authorization: <key>')

test_endpoint.description: Retrieve the FusionAuth system configuration to verify the API key is valid
